reports.title: BETFAIR_RATINGS_OVERLAY_JOIN_AUDIT_V1
reports.author: Euclid/Odin
reports.summary: Join-audit board for testing whether Betfair ratedPrice explains FS1 economic conversion, including join coverage, value_pp distribution, side agreement, speedcat, venue, and P/L cuts.
reports.authority: PriceSEER analyst interpretation of public/authorised Betfair Hub model observations
reports.boundary: Annotation, explanation, and abstention research only. Do not promote as a filter until ratings_capture_ts exists from live polling before trade decision. No Betfair connection, live orders, service control, secret inspection, or cash execution.
required_state_memory: primary question is whether Betfair ratedPrice explains FS1 economic conversion
value_pp is computed from ratedPrice and PriceSEER decision-time entry_price
minimum outputs include join_rate, missing IDs, ratedPrice coverage, value_pp distribution, side agreement, speedcat, venue, and P/L cuts
hard rule: no filter promotion until live polling captures ratings_capture_ts before trade decision
